title: Grabo Paw Patrol Birthday Balloon, Round Balloon for Children's Parties with Paw Patrol Dogs, Foil with Straw to Inflate it. Colourful Balloons Made in Italy 35 x 35 cm
features: SUITABLE FOR ANY PARTY - Our balloons are suitable for any children's party: birthdays, play dates, outings and for all your special occasions. They are a perfect addition to any little girl party. 35x35 cm

BRILLIANT MATERIAL: The foil material used for balloons is characterized by a bright and shiny surface that catches the eye and creates a cheerful and festive atmosphere. This property makes the foil ideal for reflecting light and animating a party.

LAST FOR HOURS! The sturdy sealing ensures that the balloons are sealed safely and durably, preventing air from escaping. This ensures that the balloons last a long time and retain their shape for several hours.

STRAW INCLUDED: The handy straw included in the package makes it quick and easy to inflate balloons. Using it is simple: insert it into the pre-drilled hole and blow or use a pump. You can fill our balloons with both air and helium.

MADE IN ITALY: Grabo creates and produces balloons in Italy to ensure care and attention to the product. The balloons are also non-toxic and sustainable, demonstrating the company's attention to the environment and the health of its customers.
description: Product description Paw Patrol round balloon and happy birthday is perfect for any little girl or boy party. Can be inflated with air and helium, making it versatile for any party, such as birthdays, end of school parties, outings, game dates etc. The material used is characterised by a brilliant surface that catches the eye and creates a cheerful and festive atmosphere. This property makes our balloons ideal for reflecting the light and animating a party, creating a vibrant effect, making them even more attractive and eye-catching. The sturdy sealing ensures that the balloons are sealed safely and permanently. During this process, the surface of the balloon is sealed evenly and accurately, preventing air from escaping. This ensures that the balloons last a long time and retain their shape, even after many hours or days after inflation. It also makes balloons easier to inflate and deflate, making the party preparation process even easier. The included straw makes it easy to inflate with both air and helium. The straw allows air or helium to be infused quickly and easily into the balloon. Grabo is a leader in Europe and produces balloons in Italy to ensure maximum attention and quality to the product. The balloons comply with the strictest European standards and are therefore completely non-toxic. In addition, they are sustainable, making them safe and environmentally friendly. Note: Please read carefully before use. ATTENTION! Not suitable for children under the age of three. Contains small parts that can be swallowed or inhaled. Choking hazard. Remove all packaging material before delivering the toy to your child. Do not use near overhead power lines during thunderstorms. Colours and details may vary from the picture.
